brand.name: Velvet Crumb Cakes
brand.tagline: Elegant cakes, dessert tables, and celebration sweets made to order.
brand.studioNote: Consultation studio serving New York, Brooklyn, Chicago, London, and Manchester.

categories.title: Wedding Cakes
categories.description: Tiered cakes with refined florals, delicate piping, and polished delivery planning.

categories.title: Birthday Cakes
categories.description: Elegant celebration cakes for milestone birthdays, family dinners, and private parties.

categories.title: Cupcakes
categories.description: Soft sponge, silky buttercream, and boxed presentation for gifting or dessert tables.

categories.title: Dessert Boxes
categories.description: Curated selections of mini cakes, cookies, macarons, brownies, and seasonal sweets.

categories.title: Custom Cakes
categories.description: Bespoke flavours, palettes, monograms, florals, and finishes for meaningful occasions.

features.title: Premium ingredients
features.description: Real butter, Belgian chocolate, seasonal fruit, and balanced sweetness across every order.

features.title: Design-led finishes
features.description: Colour palettes, piping, florals, and composition are treated with the care of an editorial set.

features.title: Clear ordering
features.description: Every custom cake starts with size, servings, timeline, delivery plan, and transparent pricing.

features.title: Careful delivery
features.description: Cakes are packed for safe travel and delivered with handling notes for venues and hosts.

openingHours: Sunday - Monday: Custom orders by appointment

processSteps.title: Share the occasion
processSteps.description: Tell us the date, guest count, flavour preferences, colour palette, and delivery city.

processSteps.title: Review the proposal
processSteps.description: We prepare a clear quotation with size, flavour, design direction, and pickup or delivery details.

processSteps.title: Approve the design
processSteps.description: Confirm the finish, florals, message, dietary notes, and final presentation style.

processSteps.title: Enjoy the celebration
processSteps.description: Your order is finished, boxed, and coordinated for collection, courier, or venue delivery.

products.name: Blush Garden Bento
products.description: Four-inch vanilla bean cake with blush buttercream and hand-piped florals.

products.name: Chocolate Silk Layer
products.description: Rich cocoa sponge, whipped ganache, and a glossy chocolate finish.

products.name: Champagne Berry Cake
products.description: Vanilla champagne sponge with berry compote and soft cream rosettes.

products.name: Pearl Wedding Tiers
products.description: Two-tier wedding cake with pearl detailing, satin buttercream, and floral styling.

products.name: Petite Dessert Box
products.description: Mini cupcakes, brownies, cookies, and seasonal patisserie packed for gifting.

products.name: Velvet Cupcake Dozen
products.description: A dozen piped cupcakes with coordinated colours, sprinkles, and premium boxes.

testimonials.quote: The wedding cake looked like it belonged in our floral mood board, and it tasted even better than the tasting box.
testimonials.name: Isabelle M.
testimonials.title: Bride, London

testimonials.quote: Our birthday dessert table felt polished, generous, and completely effortless. Guests kept asking who made the cupcakes.
testimonials.name: Rachel K.
testimonials.title: Private client, Brooklyn

testimonials.quote: They handled design, timing, packaging, and venue delivery beautifully. It made a corporate celebration feel personal.
testimonials.name: Claire W.
testimonials.title: Events manager, Chicago
